versions.description: Visual redesign — cinematic hero, editorial gallery, new photos from Google Drive, video placeholder, tier badge, sponsor color treatments
changes: LOGO FIX: Replaced all 3 base64-embedded logos with /img/logo-correct.png (nav, hero, footer)
HERO: Increased opacity to 0.5, added cinematic gradient overlay, decorative rule divider, min-height: 100svh
GALLERY: New editorial masonry layout (4 rows, 11 images) replacing old 12-image grid
GALLERY: Added 92 new photos from Google Drive — 44 May Party + 48 Christmas Party
GALLERY: Tabs updated to match real events: all / may parties / october party / holiday party
GALLERY: Hover effect adds linen border + brightness boost
VIDEO: New 'The Vibe' section (04.5) with 16:9 video placeholder, ready for reel
WHY SPONSOR: Added editorial pull quote block at bottom of section
TIERS: 'Most Popular' badge on Gold tier, limited availability note below grid
TIERS: Box shadow added to all tier cards
PAST SPONSORS: Mumm styled gold (#d4af37), Aperol styled orange (#E05B1A), other brands in italic
PAST SPONSORS: Added 'Want your brand here?' CTA linking to Tiers section
CSS: Added --gold and --aperol color vars to design system
CSS: New .why-pullquote, .tier-badge, .video-reel-inner, .video-placeholder styles
File size: 72.8KB

versions.description: Full site rebuild — 11 sections, real event photos, new brand system
changes: Rebuilt from 5-section placeholder to full 11-section site per spec
Added 8 real event photos from Google Drive (all 200/accessible confirmed)
New brand palette: #1a3a1a (deep forest green) + #f0ede8 (linen) + #7eb832 (accent)
Added Bebas Neue display font alongside Playfair Display + Inter
Custom cursor (8px dot + 32px ring), inverted on light sections
Grain texture on all dark sections via SVG feTurbulence
Scroll animations with IntersectionObserver (fadeUp, slideLeft, fadeIn)
Gallery with 5 vibe collection filter tabs (all / golden hour rooftop / night out / curated pours / table stories)
Sponsorship tiers: Bronze $5,000 (2 VIP) / Gold $10,000 (3 VIP) / Platinum $15,000 (5 VIP)
Stats band: 300+ guests / 5+ events / invite only
Who We Are section with event type cards
Next Event: April 25th / 75 Varick Rooftop / 10:30pm-3:30am ET
Why Sponsor: 4 numbered reasons with accent dividers
Past Sponsors: Mumm + Aperol (confirmed) + 4 Brand Partner placeholders
How It Works: 4-step flow with connecting line
Join The List: email form with inline confirmation
All contact info live: events@tigertracks.ai / (301) 646-7758 / @treehouseevents.nyc
Zero placeholder URLs (no PARTIFUL_URL_HERE, no PHOTO_URL_N)
QA: 77/77 PASS, 0 FAIL
File size: 65.9KB (under 500KB limit)
